summary: Phase 3 Behavioral Pattern AI Simulation Lab Extension - COMPLETE. Backend: 18/18 tests PASSED for POST /api/operator/simulate/behavior endpoint. Frontend: All UI elements verified working - Behavior Scenarios tab, 5 scenario type buttons, scenario cards, device selector, simulation execution with timeline chart and KPI cards.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <tr> inside <span> in timeline table - not user-facing but should be fixed

action_items: Minor: Fix React hydration warning in BehaviorScenarioTab - timeline table has <span> wrapping <tr> elements
critical_code_review_comments: Backend POST /api/operator/simulate/behavior correctly validates 5 scenario types and ramp_minutes <= duration_minutes
BehaviorSimResponse includes simulation_run_id, total_scenarios, total_behavior_anomalies, total_escalations, scenario_results array
Timeline steps correctly show behavior_score ramping via sigmoid curve from 0.15 baseline to peak intensity
Combined risk score calculation uses weight_behavior=0.2, weight_battery=0.5, weight_signal=0.3 with correlation_bonus
With weight_behavior=0.2, behavior anomaly at 0.8 intensity produces ~16 combined score (below 60 threshold), so no escalation as expected
Frontend BehaviorScenarioTab correctly implements all data-testid attributes
Timeline chart uses Recharts ComposedChart with Area for behavior/combined scores and ReferenceLine for threshold at 60
seed_data_creation: None needed - used existing DEV-001 device
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Behavioral Pattern AI Simulation Lab Extension fully tested. POST /api/operator/simulate/behavior accepts scenarios array with scenario_type (5 types), device_identifier, duration_minutes, intensity (0.1-1.0), ramp_minutes. Returns simulation_run_id, scenario_results with timeline showing behavior_score ramping and combined_risk_score calculation. Frontend BehaviorScenarioTab in SimulationLab page has 5 scenario type buttons, scenario cards with inputs, and displays results with summary banner, KPI cards (peak behavior, peak combined, final tier, time to escalation), timeline chart, and expandable step detail table. Simulation runs are saved to history with run_type='behavior'.
